summary: Iter34 review — VELA INVEST reshape verified end-to-end. Backend regression (37/37 pass). Frontend Playwright (45/45 pass) covering minimal /invest landing, manual fallback nav, /invest/asset/demo dashboard with Deal Verdict (PASS, 100%, €137,080, RENOVATE), 7 sticky tabs with anchor scroll, Final Verdict section with top-3 risk flags + CTAs, and verification gate for dft_xxx route.
critical_code_review_comments: InvestTabsBar IntersectionObserver: rootMargin '-30% 0px -55% 0px' combined with threshold 0.25 may rarely fire for sections shorter than viewport — consider threshold 0 with pure rootMargin trigger zone. Not a blocker since active state tracks correctly in practice.

InvestDashboard.jsx: when user mutates draft on /invest/asset/demo (mutated=true), useMemo recomputes via computeInvestIntelligence on every keystroke. Acceptable for a demo, but a debounce would prevent re-render thrash if user types rapidly.

DealVerdict.jsx delta label uses `var(--inv-signal-up)` for any positive delta — but a positive delta means asking is HIGHER than target offer (=> price needs to come down). The 'below asking' label is correct, the green color implies positive sentiment which makes sense for the buyer. Minor semantic double-take but fine.
test_credentials: Public demo routes — no auth needed.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing /invest/asset/demo and live ingest of a Spitogatos URL for dft_ verification gate test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter34 was 100% pass across both backend (37 tests) and frontend (45 testid + interaction checks). /invest now strips to clean paste landing; demo dashboard renders DealVerdict (PASS · 100% · €137,080 · RENOVATE), sticky 7-tab nav, all sections in correct order, FinalVerdict section with sorted top-3 risk flags + memo/new-acquisition CTAs. Verification gate still active on dft_xxx routes (Verdict not rendered before verification). Minor: console 401s observed during dashboard load are from Stripe/account polling — unrelated to invest flow.
